subject: request from our mexico city office

emails.subject: Request from our Mexico City Office
emails.subject_base: Request from our Mexico City Office
emails.body: Request from our Mexico City Office Vince Do you or someone else down on the trading floor have a copy of this book Ricardo can borrow??? If not any other ideas where I can get it> thx Margaret Forwarded by Margaret Carson/Corp/Enron on 04/18/2000 04:13 PM Ricardo Charvel 04/18/2000 04:02 PM

emails.subject: Re: Request from our Mexico City Office
emails.subject_base: Request from our Mexico City Office
emails.body: Re: Request from our Mexico City Office Margaret, I don't have it. Maybe we can get a copy directly from the CBOT. Info Central could help. Vince Margaret Carson@ENRON 04/18/2000 04:15 PM
